mnemonics.title: Servlet Lifecycle
mnemonics.content: I Start Doing: Init() begins, Service() handles requests, Destroy() ends

mnemonics.title: HTTP Methods
mnemonics.content: GET Grabs, POST Posts: Use GET for retrieval, POST for data submission

mnemonics.title: JSP Lifecycle
mnemonics.content: JSP's Ice Cream Shop Delights: jspInit(), _jspService(), jspDestroy()

mnemonics.title: Parameter Methods
mnemonics.content: Single vs Squad: getParameter() for single values, getParameterValues() for multiple

mnemonics.title: Cookie Handling
mnemonics.content: Bake, Store, Retrieve, Expire: Create cookie → add to response → get from request → setMaxAge()

acronyms.usage: Maps to HTTP methods: POST (Create), GET (Read), PUT (Update), DELETE (Delete)

acronyms.expansion: Create, Obtain, Override, Keep, Implement, Expire
acronyms.usage: Cookie handling steps: Create object → obtain via request → override values → keep state → implement methods → set expiration

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a human life: Born (init()) → Works (service()) → Retires (destroy())
GET as an envelope with a question mark, POST as a package being delivered
Browser cookie jar storing named cookies with expiration dates
Three-stage rocket: Ignition (jspInit()) → Flight (_jspService()) → Booster drop (jspDestroy())
HTML form with fields flowing into a servlet like a pipeline

analogies.analogy: Like a restaurant: Setup kitchen (init()) → Serve customers (service()) → Close shop (destroy())
Name tags at a conference - server gives tag, client shows it for subsequent interactions
Chef preparing dish: Setup ingredients (jspInit()) → Cooking (_jspService()) → Cleanup (jspDestroy())
GET like asking for a menu (visible request), POST like submitting an order (hidden transaction)
